Emily Carter
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Motivated customer service professional with over 5 years of experience in retail and hospitality. Strong interpersonal skills and a keen ability to manage customer relationships. Seeking to leverage my background in operational support and teamwork in a new role as a Forklift Operator.
